headline: GSK: 'Strong Buy' On Mo-Rez Oncology Expansion Potential
summary: GSK's BLENREP is regaining traction in multiple myeloma, outperforming JNJ's DARZALEX in OS and potential label expansions. Learn more on GSK stock here.

headline: Johnson & Johnson MedTech Data Sparks Fresh Look At JNJ Valuation
summary: Johnson & Johnson (NYSE:JNJ) presented new clinical data on its recently FDA-approved TECNIS PureSee intraocular lens at the 2026 ASCRS meeting. The data highlighted vision outcomes, patient satisfaction, and spectacle independence compared with standard intraocular lens solutions. The update adds clinical detail to earlier regulatory approvals and product announcements in Johnson & Johnson's MedTech portfolio. For investors tracking NYSE:JNJ, this update sits squarely in the MedTech side...
